title: Sink or Float
description: A buoyancy prediction game where kids decide whether everyday objects will sink or float.
learningGoals: Predict whether familiar objects sink or float
Build intuition about weight, shape, air, and water pushing up
interactionModel: choose-one tap the sink or float answer card after an object prompt
feedbackModel: Correct predictions sparkle and get spoken science praise; misses wiggle gently, get a spoken nudge, and replay the prompt.
credits: Emoji placeholder object and bathtub art. Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
